name: omega-llm-interface
description: Omega MCP server and skills for bounded LLM operation of the Omega sports analytics repo.

interface.shortDescription: Run Omega through typed MCP tools.
interface.longDescription: Provides Codex with Omega-specific skills and a local MCP server configuration for deterministic sports analytics, replay audit, trace inspection, and calibration dry-runs while preserving LLM and engine ownership boundaries.
defaultPrompt: Run Omega via MCP for this matchup.
